title: Alsophila aramaganensis

intro: Alsophila aramaganensis, also known as the Arakan fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of South Asia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
